goal: Celtic Cross poster: 'MeowTarot' title in a broken/blocky font + reading text too faint
root_cause: The brand title used "Poppins" which isn't preloaded into the canvas (faceSpecs) → fell back to a blocky sans. The reading-box narration used cream #f7f4ee → low contrast on the pale box.
fix: Both celtic poster renderers: 'MeowTarot' title → italic 700 'Cormorant Garamond' (the loaded serif the Daily poster uses), matching the daily style. Reading body fillStyle #f7f4ee → #3d1a5c (dark plum) for readable contrast.
verified: node --check ok; md5 parity canonical=www=ios. (Canvas render not re-run in harness — font/colour change only; recommend regenerating a celtic poster to eyeball.)
